Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPSS2 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform FHIR Functions;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DVPXUTL ; GMRVUT0 1446 ; SRCHSS(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N CNT,DFN,ICN,PXFILTER,IX,RSLTARY,SMRY,ARRAY,GMRVSTR,DTFND,DT1,DT2,BASE S (DFN,ICN,GMRVSTR)="",(SMRY,CNT,IX,DTFND,DT1,DT2)=0 D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS),CLNPARAM^DVPUTLS ;Check patient parameter I $P($G(QUERYPAR("patient")),U)="" D G QUIT . D OOERR^DVPERR(.TARGET,"error","required","MSG_RESOURCE_ID_MISSING","Parameter: patient is required.","SRCHVS^DVPVS2") S ICN=$P($G(QUERYPAR("patient")),U) I $$PATCHECK^DVPUTLS(ICN,"SRCHVS^DVPVS2")=0 G QUIT S BASE=100 F CNT=1:1:10 D . S BASE=BASE+1 . N ARRAY D FHIRSS^DVPSS1(.ARRAY,"urn:va:smoking-status:516:185601V825290:"_BASE,SMRY) . M @TARGET@("results","bundle",CNT)=ARRAY QUIT ;
